summary: Visual verification only (frontend, no backend). All 5 requested visual tweaks for BLOWUP studio verified PASS on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x812). Captured screenshots of hero, full-width yellow keyword marquee, and 5 section headers (01 STUDIET, 02 BYG DIN SESSION, 03 LYT, 04 ARTISTER, 05 RUMMET) plus mobile equivalents. No horizontal divider/dash lines were detected programmatically (.h-px, short thin colored spans), and no horizontal overflow on mobile (docW=375 == winW=375).

integration_issues.issue: In headless Chromium the Spotify iframe renders a white panel with text 'Application error: a client-side exception has occurred'. This is the third-party Spotify embed failing in the automation browser and was flagged as out-of-scope in iteration_3. Verify in a real browser; consider a graceful fallback UI if Spotify embed fails to mount, since the current fallback is a large white box on the dark page.

verifications.hero_headline_present: FRA IDÉ / TIL HIT. — confirmed in DOM and screenshot
verifications.yellow_marquee_desktop: bg=rgb(255,216,52)=#FFD834; visible width=1920px (full viewport); track width=6627px; itemCount=24 (6 keywords × 4 repeats); contains MIX, MASTER, BEATS, COACHING, VOKAL, TOPLINE — no empty yellow gap on right side
verifications.section_header_dividers_desktop: 0 .h-px / .h-px.w-8 divider spans; 0 thin (h<=3px, 10<=w<=80) blank colored spans in main; visual screenshots confirm only '<index> <LABEL>' with no decorative bar
section_headers_screenshotted: 02 BYG DIN SESSION / SÆT DIN PAKKE SAMMEN.
05 RUMMET / ET RUM AT LAVE HITS I.
verifications.mobile_no_horizontal_overflow: document.documentElement.scrollWidth=375 == window.innerWidth=375. The only DOM nodes wider than viewport are inside .marquee-track which is contained by parent overflow:hidden — this is the intended marquee scroll behavior, not a layout overflow
verifications.brand_palette: Yellow #FFD834 (rgb(255,216,52)) confirmed on marquee bg; turquoise asterisks in #lyt non-yellow marquee visible in screenshot; near-black background with white body text

action_items: (Optional) Add a graceful fallback for the Spotify iframe in Releases section so a third-party failure doesn't surface 'Application error: a client-side exception has occurred' as a large white box. Could render a static link/CTA when the iframe fails.
critical_code_review_comments: Marquee.jsx yellow variant uses 4x repetition with px-8 sm:px-14 lg:px-20 — produces a 6627px track on a 1920px viewport (≈276px per item on desktop), which guarantees a continuous fill without empty gaps. Good.

SectionHeader.jsx now renders only [index span + label span] inside a flex.items-center.gap-3 wrapper. No <span class='h-px ...'> divider remains. Programmatic scan returned 0 thin background-colored line spans across all section headers — change is correctly applied.
Cursor.jsx exports only a .cursor-dot motion.div, no .cursor-ring sibling. Confirmed at runtime.

tailwind.config.js brand colors aligned with spec: brand #FFD834, tide #70C9C4, ink #000000, bone #FFFFFF; fontFamily display/sans both Barlow. H1 computed fontFamily 'Barlow, sans-serif', fontWeight 900 — matches Barlow Black requirement.

Mobile (375px): no document-level horizontal overflow. Items appearing 'over' the right edge belong to the .marquee-track div which is intentionally wider than its overflow:hidden parent — this is correct marquee behavior.
test_credentials: N/A — public landing page, no auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure visual verification iteration. The Playwright runner's Python parser was sensitive to certain inline string-literal patterns inside page.evaluate() — splitting JS into multiple smaller evaluate() calls (one expression per call) and avoiding embedded arrow-function bodies that mix '() => {' with later '(...)' worked reliably. The Spotify embed inside #lyt throws 'Application error: a client-side exception has occurred' in headless Chromium only; not a regression from this iteration's CSS changes. Section header dividers, cursor ring, marquee gap, and mobile overflow are all resolved.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs introduced by the requested visual tweaks. All five requested changes (mobile optimization, removed section-header dividers, full-width spaced yellow marquee, removed cursor ring, Barlow typography + brand palette) are present in DOM and confirmed visually.
